decisions.briefing: Markets posted a muted but positive session with NASDAQ up 0.4% and S&P 500 up 0.3%, reflecting a neutral risk environment. All three holdings — META, COIN, and MSTR — continue to show strong bullish momentum (score 95 each) and are within healthy range of their profit targets, so no rotation is warranted. Holding all positions and preserving cash for any pullback opportunity.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equity markets edged higher on Wednesday in a low-conviction session, with technology and growth names leading modest gains. The S&P 500 rose 0.3% and the NASDAQ added 0.4% as investors digested mixed macro signals with no major catalysts to drive a breakout. Crypto-linked equities like COIN and MSTR held gains as Bitcoin remained stable, underpinning sentiment in that segment.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週三小幅上揚，整體走勢溫和，科技與成長類股領漲。標普500指數上升0.3%，那斯達克指數上漲0.4%，市場在缺乏明確催化劑的情況下維持窄幅震盪。加密貨幣相關股票如COIN與MSTR因比特幣價格保持穩定而守住漲幅，支撐相關板塊情緒。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum continuation refers to the tendency of assets already in an uptrend to keep rising as long as the underlying signals — such as MACD bullish crossover, RSI in the 55–70 zone, and price above the 20-day moving average — remain intact. Rather than chasing new trades on a quiet day, holding existing momentum positions and letting winners run is often the higher-probability play. Today, all three portfolio holdings maintained their momentum scores, making 'do nothing' the correct decision.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能延續是指已處於上升趨勢的資產，在技術指標仍然健康的情況下（如MACD黃金交叉、RSI位於55至70的強勢區間、股價高於20日均線），往往會持續走高。在市場平靜的交易日，與其追逐新倉位，不如持有現有的強勢持股、讓獲利部位繼續發展，往往是勝率更高的策略。今日三個持倉的動能評分均維持強勁，「按兵不動」正是正確的決策。
